# $SITE_NAME

> $SITE_SUMMARY — one or two sentences, plain text, no links, describing what this site provides.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage]($SITE_URL/): $PAGE_HOME_DESC
- [Services]($SITE_URL/services/): Index of services offered.
- [Insights]($SITE_URL/insights/): Short strategic notes.
- [Contact]($SITE_URL/#contact): Project inquiry path.

## Services

- [Service A]($SITE_URL/services/service-a/): One-line description.
- [Service B]($SITE_URL/services/service-b/): One-line description.

## Insights

- [Insight A]($SITE_URL/insights/insight-a/): One-line description.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Full LLM context]($SITE_URL/llms-full.txt): Expanded context, services, FAQ, contact.
- [Markdown homepage]($SITE_URL/index.md): Clean Markdown version of the homepage.
- [Sitemap]($SITE_URL/sitemap.xml): Direct XML sitemap.
- [Sitemap index]($SITE_URL/sitemap-index.xml): Generated sitemap index.
- [RSS feed]($SITE_URL/rss.xml): Updates and notes.
- [AI catalog]($SITE_URL/ai-catalog.json): Catalog of machine-readable resources and actions.
- [OpenAPI contact action]($SITE_URL/openapi.json): Schema of the public inquiry action.
- [MCP discovery]($SITE_URL/mcp.json): Static discovery manifest.
- [Brand profile]($SITE_URL/brand.json): Compact brand, service, identity data.
- [Humans]($SITE_URL/humans.txt): Ownership, contact, standards context.

## Contact

- [Contact section]($SITE_URL/#contact): Project inquiry form.
- [Email](mailto:$SITE_EMAIL): Direct business inquiries.
